summary: The repository is primarily an AI-driven qbank application, not a source repository of static lecture, image, or algorithm content. The only content-adjacent syllabus payload is the AP/CP topic taxonomy in data/syllabus.ts, while VisualModels.tsx provides synthetic educational visualizations rather than stored media assets.

candidates.reason: Canonical AP/CP syllabus tree used to drive question generation and topic selection.
Contains educational visual simulators (canvas and D3), but no standalone image files or image dataset.
LLM prompt templates and generation logic for board-style questions, deep dives, and image-based questions.

dependencies.note: Defines the Syllabus and Question schemas consumed by the content-adjacent files.
Consumes generated questions and syllabus structure in the main quiz UI.
Uses generated questions and case data for mentor-style exploration.

recommendation: Do not copy payloads yet. If migration is needed, extract or regenerate tutorial content from data/syllabus.ts and geminiService.ts first. There are no standalone lecture or algorithm assets to migrate, and no image library beyond synthetic UI visualizations.
